meta.title: Uni Sport EC | Strategic Consulting & Sports Management
meta.description: Strategic and operational consulting for clubs, federations and athletes across Ecuador and Spain. Events, talent and sports business transformation.

home.title: Strategy. Management. Results.
home.subtitle: We help clubs, federations and athletes compete at the level of global sport.
home.missionBody: Professionalize the sports industry with world-class strategy, management and execution.
home.visionBody: To be the strategic partner of choice for Spanish-speaking clubs, federations and athletes.
home.valuesBody: Integrity, operational excellence, global mindset, and a relentless focus on results.

consulting.name: Consulting
consulting.lead: Institutional, commercial and sporting strategy for growing organizations.

events.name: Events
events.lead: End-to-end design and operation of sports events and brand experiences.

talent.name: Talent
talent.lead: Representation, career development and full athlete management.

partners.heading: Who we are
partners.lead: A team with experience across clubs, federations and international events.
